The Residence

A two-bedroom residence on the second floor of Manastiri Bay, opening to both a loggia and a private terrace. Bright living space and two bedrooms, poised above the resort with the sea beyond.

FROM THE GROUND UP

Watch Manastiri take shape

Filmed on site over the course of construction — the frame rising, the terraces forming, the façade closing in. A rare look at how a residence of this quality is actually built.
